description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open-plan layout and a large outdoor green area. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through large windows and glass doors, and a prominent wooden deck area with a circular hot tub or pool. The exterior is primarily white with brown and wooden accents, and the property is surrounded by a low boundary wall. There is a detached small utility or storage building adjacent to the main house, matching the main structure's style. The bungalow is designed for comfortable urban living, with easy access to outdoor spaces and ample natural light.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and a detached utility building, surrounded by a green yard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance, wooden deck with a circular hot tub, and the detached utility building clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear side with a large green yard and the back entrance, as well as the utility building's door.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, showing the arrangement of windows and the full length of the green yard.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the bungalow, focusing on the flat roof, side windows, and the deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
